summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Blogs4Blocks iteration 16 - Admin Campaigns Analytics Tab. All 15 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. New Campaigns tab shows revenue stats, inquiry pipeline, featured post performance, recent transactions, and GA4 link.

Campaigns response has featured section (count, views, likes, comments, posts) - PASS

Campaigns response has recent_bookings array - PASS

GET /api/posts/featured/list still works - PASS
GET /api/stats still works (30 posts, 29 users, 16 countries) - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: Admin campaigns endpoint correctly aggregates revenue from payment_transactions collection
Featured post performance correctly sums views/likes/comments from posts with is_featured=true

All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
StatCard component reused for consistent styling across revenue/pipeline stats
seed_data_creation: Test checkout sessions created via POST /api/payments/checkout during testing (5 transactions visible in admin)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Admin Campaigns Analytics Tab - Shows revenue stats ($0 total, 0 paid, 4 pending), inquiry pipeline (2 new, 1 contacted, 0 closed), featured post performance (671 views, 197 likes, 1 comment across 7 posts), recent transactions table (5 test transactions), GA4 link. 2) Previous features still working: City backgrounds (Statue of Liberty on homepage, Seattle on Advertise page), Stripe payments (rate card, checkout), featured carousel (7 posts), homepage stats (30 posts, 29 contributors, 16 countries). Admin user: admin_camp@test.com / pass123.
